title: 咖啡馆工作日
titleEn: A Workday at the Coffee Shop
caption: 找到了一个有好光线的位置，效率出奇地高
captionEn: Found a seat with great light, and the whole day ended up being surprisingly productive.

title: 桌面改造完成
caption: 花了一个周末，总算调整到满意的状态
captionEn: Spent a full weekend on it and finally got everything where I want it.

title: 周末徒步
caption: 爬到山顶才发现手机没电了
captionEn: Made it to the top and only then realized my phone had run out of battery.
